title: Many Lifes
description: This datapack adds adjustable hardcore. That is, it adds the ability to set how many lives it takes to completely die
body:
This datapack adds the ability to change the number of lives for complete death. You need to unpack it into the Datapacks folder, which contains an empty folder, you need to unpack it into it. To set the value, use the **/trigger (number of lives)-lifes** command. Example: 
```
/trigger 15-lifes
```
To turn off this hardcore, use the 
```
/trigger off-lifes
```
The maximum you can set is 25 lives.
